action.proof_term:
intro s C X z R L hmass hcard hsifted
rw [hmass] at hsifted
linarith

intro s C X z R L hmass hcard hsifted
rw [hmass] at hsifted
linarith

info.lean_statement:
∀ (s : SelbergSieve) (C : Finset ℕ) (X z R : ℕ) (L : ℝ),
  s.totalMass = X →
  (C.card : ℝ) ≤ s.siftedSum + z →
  s.siftedSum ≤ 2 * s.totalMass / L + (((R * R + 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) ^ 8) →
  (C.card : ℝ) ≤ 2 * X / L + (((R * R + 1 : ℕ) : ℝ) ^ 8) + z

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
